name: conversation_branch_flow
purpose: Low/moderate result add-on script brancher for what happened after asking directly.

entry.title: Try one direct line
entry.intro: Use one of these and then pick what happened.
teaserStarters: I care about you and I have noticed some changes. Can I ask you something direct?
You matter to me. Are you thinking about suicide?

options.label: They denied it or got defensive
They changed the subject or avoided

sections.heading: Say this first
lines: Thank you for telling me. I am really glad you said that out loud.
I am here with you. You do not have to carry this alone.

sections.heading: Ask these next
lines: Are you in immediate danger right now?
Have you thought about how you would do it?
Do you have access right now?

sections.heading: Stabilize and connect
lines: Thank you for being honest with me.
I want us to get support now, together.
Would you call 988 with me right now, or text HOME to 741741 while I stay with you?

sections.heading: If they agree
lines: Good. I am staying with you while we do it.

sections.heading: If they hesitate
lines: I hear you. We can do one step at a time. I am not leaving you alone in this.

optionalCapture.headline: Want this full script and safety steps in one place?
options: Email me the full conversation map

branches.title: If they denied it or got defensive

sections.heading: De-escalate
lines: I hear you. I am not trying to judge you or label you.
I asked because I care about you and I want you safe.

sections.heading: Keep the door open
lines: If today is not the day to talk, that is okay.
I am still here, and you can tell me anytime.

sections.heading: Gentle re-check
lines: Can I ask one better question: have things felt unbearable lately?
On a hard day, do you feel like you want to disappear?

sections.heading: Close with connection
lines: I care about you either way.
Can I check in again tomorrow?

optionalCapture.headline: Want more exact lines for this week?
options: Email me the full script set

branches.title: If they changed the subject or avoided

sections.heading: Return to topic
lines: Before we move on, I want to come back to something important.
I asked because you matter to me.

sections.heading: Direct and calm
lines: I want to be clear: are you having thoughts about suicide?

sections.heading: If they keep avoiding
lines: You do not have to explain everything right now.
I just need to know if you are safe tonight.

sections.heading: Bridge to support
lines: If talking to me feels hard, we can contact someone neutral together right now.
We can call 988 and just start with: I am worried and not sure what to say.

optionalCapture.headline: Want the full script set for hard conversations?
options: Email me the full conversation map

globalRules: Use plain language and non-diagnostic wording.
Keep crisis support visible on all script screens.
For affirmative branch, show crisis actions before any capture or product offer.
